mapper.select: select document_id, company_id, document_category_id, title, description, visibility, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, content_kind, draft_json, published_json, published_at, published_by from documents d where d.company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and d.content_kind = #{contentKind,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(trim(coalesce(d.status, ''))) <> 'DELETED' order by updated_at desc nulls last, created_at desc

select d.document_id, d.company_id, d.document_category_id, d.title, d.description, d.visibility, d.status, d.created_by, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.content_kind, d.draft_json, d.published_json, d.published_at, d.published_by from documents d
order by d.created_at desc nulls last, d.updated_at desc nulls last limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select d.document_id, d.company_id, d.document_category_id, d.title, d.description, d.visibility, d.status, d.created_by, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.content_kind, d.draft_json, d.published_json, d.published_at, d.published_by from documents d
order by d.updated_at desc nulls last, d.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
